statusLine.command: cat | jq -r '(.context_window.used_percentage // 0 | round) as $pct | .model.display_name + " • " + (.workspace.current_dir | split("/") | last) + (if $pct >= 85 then " • \u001b[31m⚠ COMPACT SOON (" + ($pct | tostring) + "%)\u001b[0m" elif $pct >= 75 then " • \u001b[38;5;208m" + ($pct | tostring) + "% context\u001b[0m" elif $pct >= 65 then " • \u001b[33m" + ($pct | tostring) + "% context\u001b[0m" else "" end)'
